RiskAnalysis.title: Risk Analysis
RiskAnalysis.description: AI-powered analysis of your business profile against each matched regulation. Compliance gaps, deadlines, and penalty exposure categorized by severity.
RiskAnalysis.noScanResults: Run a compliance scan first to generate a risk analysis.
RiskAnalysis.generatingDesc: Your compliance gaps are being analyzed. This may take up to 60 seconds.
RiskAnalysis.readyToAnalyzeDesc: Analyze your compliance gaps, deadlines, and penalty exposure based on your scan results.

Recommendations.title: Recommendations
Recommendations.description: Prioritized action list based on your scan results. Compliance steps, recommended insurance, and timeline.
Recommendations.noScanResults: Run a compliance scan first to get recommendations.
Recommendations.generatingDesc: Your prioritized action list is being created. This may take up to 60 seconds.
Recommendations.readyToGenerateDesc: Generate a prioritized action list based on your scan results.
Recommendations.riskTip: Tip: Run the Risk Analysis first for more detailed recommendations.

Newsletter.authRequired: Sign in to configure the newsletter.
Newsletter.optInDesc: Receive regular updates on regulation changes in your selected areas.
Newsletter.areasDesc: Select the areas you want to be informed about.
Newsletter.previewInfo: You'll receive regulation updates based on your selected areas above.

impressumContent.title: Legal Notice
impressumContent.subtitle: Information pursuant to § 5 TMG
impressumContent.vatIdInfo: VAT identification number pursuant to § 27a UStG: [DE Number]
impressumContent.liabilityText: The contents of this application have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. Use of the content is at the user's own risk. The information provided does not constitute legal advice.
impressumContent.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law.

datenschutzContent.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutzContent.subtitle: Information pursuant to Art. 13 GDPR
datenschutzContent.dataCollection: Collection and Processing of Personal Data
datenschutzContent.dataCollectionText: When using ComplyRadar, the following personal data is collected and processed:
datenschutzContent.dataPoints:
Email address (upon registration)
Password (stored encrypted)
Business data (as part of the compliance scan)
Usage data (time and frequency of scans)
datenschutzContent.purposeText: Your data is processed exclusively for providing the ComplyRadar service. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract).
datenschutzContent.storageText: Your data is stored on Supabase servers (EU region). Data is stored for the duration of your account usage. Upon account deletion, all personal data will be deleted within 30 days.
datenschutzContent.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. Contact us at datenschutz@complyradar.de.
datenschutzContent.cookiesText: ComplyRadar uses only technically necessary cookies for authentication. No tracking or marketing cookies are used.
datenschutzContent.changesText: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy to reflect changes in legal requirements or modifications to the service.

arbeitssicherheit.name: Klaus Weber
arbeitssicherheit.title: Workplace Safety Specialist
arbeitssicherheit.bio: Over 15 years of experience in workplace safety for trade businesses. Specialized in risk assessments and protective measures.

arbeitsrecht.name: Sabine Braun
arbeitsrecht.title: Employment Law Attorney
arbeitsrecht.bio: Advice on employment contracts, dismissal protection, and employee rights. Specialized in small and medium businesses.

gewerberecht.name: Martin Hoffmann
gewerberecht.title: Commercial Law Consultant
gewerberecht.bio: Expert in business registration, trade register, and commercial permits. Extensive consulting experience.

umweltrecht.name: Andrea Fischer
umweltrecht.title: Environmental Compliance Officer
umweltrecht.bio: Specialist in environmental regulations, emission control, and waste disposal for trade and manufacturing businesses.

produktsicherheit.name: Thomas Richter
produktsicherheit.title: Product Safety Engineer
produktsicherheit.bio: CE marking, product liability, and safety standards. Support with conformity assessment of your products.

datenschutz.name: Laura Klein
datenschutz.title: Data Protection Officer

versicherungspflichten.name: Jens Neumann
versicherungspflichten.title: Insurance Broker
versicherungspflichten.bio: Independent insurance broker for public liability, machinery insurance, and disability coverage in the trades.

general.name: Frank Schneider
general.title: Compliance Consultant
